data.title: Bitcoin supporters push for Signal to integrate BTC in new initiative, gaining support from Dorsey and Todd. #BitcoinForSignal
data.description: Jack Dorsey and Peter Todd, two prominent figures in the Bitcoin community, are advocating for Signal, a popular privacy messaging app, to integrate Bitcoin into its platform. This initiative, known as the "Bitcoin for Signal" campaign, aims to promote the use of Bitcoin and boost adoption within the Signal app user base. The support from these Bitcoin advocates underscores the growing interest in merging privacy-focused communication tools with cryptocurrency payment options. This move could potentially expand Signal's user base and elevate Bitcoin's utility in everyday transactions. The campaign has garnered attention from crypto enthusiasts and has the potential to influence the future integration of Bitcoin within messaging apps.

data.title: Bitcoin enthusiasts push for Signal to integrate BTC in new "Bitcoin for Signal" campaign, supported by Jack Dorsey & Peter Todd.
data.description: A campaign called "Bitcoin for Signal" has gained support from notable figures in the Bitcoin community, including Jack Dorsey and Peter Todd. They are advocating for the privacy messaging app Signal to incorporate Bitcoin as a payment option. This movement aims to promote the use of Bitcoin and enhance the functionality of Signal by integrating the digital currency. The initiative has attracted attention and backing given its potential to merge privacy-focused communication with cryptocurrency payments.

data.description: Tax season in Los Angeles was a time of transformation as Kaimore's Volunteer Income Tax Assistance (VITA) program offered free tax assistance to over 500 households in 2025. data.title: Smartmatic executives face bribery charges for scheme to win contracts from Philippine elections commission.
